name: Corvée System
description: This society considers it the absolute right of the state to decide where its citizens live and work.
tooltip: $t$- Waives all $r_unity$ costs for Pop Resettlement.

name: Imperial Cult
description: This society has a dominant state religion where the ruler is worshiped as a living deity.

name: Beacon of Liberty
description: This society is a shining beacon of light in a sea of darkness. Liberty and individual freedoms are held in the highest regard here.

name: Exalted Priesthood
description: To guard against heresy, this society is ruled by a religious council consisting of the wisest and most pious members of the clergy.

name: Philosopher King
description: It is not enough to simply rule. The Ship of State must be guided by a king that wields enough wisdom and knowledge to steer it true.

name: Meritocracy
description: An individual's social station or personal connections should have no bearing on their profession. The sole basis for advancement in this society is demonstrated ability and talent.

name: Citizen Service
description: Are you doing your part? Full citizenship and the political responsibility that comes with it is limited to those who have served a tour of duty in the military. Service guarantees citizenship.

name: Technocracy
description: To maximize efficiency, this society is governed according to the principles of science and rationality. The personal whims of an ignorant and dangerously unqualified political elite must not be allowed to interfere.
tooltip: - Capital Buildings replace $job_politician$ Jobs with $job_head_researcher_plural$ - Scientists start with random Expertise trait - Expertise traits have additional effects - Starts with an additional Scientist

name: Feudal Society
description: This society is organized in a feudal manner, with a monarch whose rule relies on powerful vassals that govern their territories with considerable autonomy.
tooltip: - Ignore Diplomatic Requirements when proposing Subjugation - Your Subjects cannot have the following Agreement Terms: $t$ $subject_cannot_expand$ $t$ Do not join subject wars $t$ $subject_can_not_do_diplomacy$

name: Police State
description: To quash any traces of dissent, the population in this repressive society is carefully monitored and controlled by a large internal police force.

name: Idealistic Foundation
description: This society was founded on strong idealistic values. Whether the current government remains true to them or not, the people have not forgotten.

name: Environmentalist
description: This society seeks to co-exist in harmony with nature. Great care is taken to preserve the environment and limit consumerism where possible.

name: Slaver Guilds
description: Much of the true political power in this society rests with a number of powerful and ruthless slaver guilds. They know how to get the most out of a slave.

name: Inward Perfection
description: This calm and pacifist society has little use for strangers who do not understand its way of life. More than anything, these people would prefer to be left alone.
tooltip: Cannot have Rivals Cannot form Defensive Pacts Cannot form Migration Treaties Cannot form Research Agreements Cannot form Commercial Pacts Cannot Guarantee Independence Cannot join Federations Cannot Infiltrate pre-FTLs Cannot have forced Subjects Cannot use Unrestricted Wars policy
effects: country_unity_produces_mult: +20.0%; founder_species_growth_mult: +10.0%; country_edict_fund_add: +50; pop_citizen_happiness: +0.05; envoys_add: -1; intel_encryption_add: +1; intel_decryption_add: -1

name: Warrior Culture
description: This society has developed into a hardy warrior culture. Martial prowess is valued above all else, and true glory can only be found on the field of battle.
tooltip: - Replaces $job_entertainer$ Jobs with $job_duelist$ Jobs. - $job_duelist_plural$ turn $alloys$ into $unity$, , and . - Replaces $job_xeno_zoo_animal$ Jobs with $job_xeno_zoo_beast$ Jobs.

name: Distinguished Admiralty
description: The Fleet and the Admiralty have unusually prominent roles in this society, wielding a great deal of influence in political circles. They have the pick of the litter when it comes to new military recruits.

name: Free Haven
description: This society has a well-earned reputation as a free haven. The tired, the poor, the huddled masses yearning to breathe free - all are welcome here, regardless of their species or origin.

name: Cutthroat Politics
description: The political system in this society is renowned for its intrigue. Power struggles, shady backroom deals and cloak and dagger scheming are par for the course. Those who survive long enough to learn the game, however, tend to learn it well.

name: Corporate Dominion
description: This society is dominated by a megacorporation that has completely supplanted the role of the state.
tooltip: Starts with the $tech_space_trading$ technology already unlocked  : Private Colony Ship

name: Agrarian Idyll
description: A simple and peaceful life can often be the most rewarding. This agrarian society has, to a large extent, managed to avoid large-scale urbanization.

name: Shadow Council
description: Unbeknownst to its own citizens, this society is actually manipulated from behind the scenes by a secretive shadow council. Appearances must be kept, but the tyranny of the majority should also be guarded against. After all, what if the fools vote for the wrong candidate?

name: Mining Guilds
description: Several large mining guilds have reached a dominant position in this society. The government relies heavily on their support.

name: Parliamentary System
description: The parliamentary system in this society encourages a free and lively debate. Currying favor with one of the dominant political factions can prove to be quite advantageous.
tooltip: Factions will form in your empire shortly after the game starts.

name: Efficient Bureaucracy
description: This society is renowned for its efficiency. Not only do the mag-trains run on time, but the colossal bureaucratic apparatus required to run an interstellar nation has been greatly streamlined.
tooltip: $job_bureaucrat_plural$ and $job_priest_name_plural_with_icon$ provide scaling with their $r_unity$ production.

name: Nationalistic Zeal
description: A strong sense of nationalistic pride permeates all layers of this society.

name: Functional Architecture
description: This society is renowned for its simple yet functional architecture. There are those who would refer to this building style as boring or even depressing, but in most cases, neo-concrete does the job just as well as any other building material.

name: Aristocratic Elite
description: This society has an entrenched nobility that occupies the upper echelons of society.
tooltip: - Capital Buildings replace $job_politician$ Jobs with $job_noble_plural$ - Can construct $building_noble_estates$ buildings that add additional $job_noble$ Jobs - Grants access to the $holding_noble_vacation_homes$ Holding - Leaders have a 20% chance to start with an additional positive and negative trait.

name: Shared Burdens
description: This society believes in an equitable distribution of resources, making little to no distinction between the needs of ruler and ruled. All work together for the benefit of the whole.
tooltip: Allows $living_standard_shared_burden$ Living Standard, under which all Pops have moderate $consumer_goods$ Upkeep regardless of Strata Disables the use of most other Living Standards Grants access to the $holding_communal_housing_outreach$ Holding

name: Fanatic Purifiers
description: This society appears hellbent on scouring the galaxy of all other sapient life. Come what may, they will suffer no xenos to live.
tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with other species! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Purification' casus belli on other species Xeno Pops will always be purged Gains Unity from purging Xeno Pops May use $bombardment_armageddon$ bombardment stance

name: Barbaric Despoilers
description: This society holds few things sacred. To fight is to live, and the strongest may seize whatever they covet.
tooltip: Cannot form Migration Treaties Cannot form (but can join) Federations other than Martial Alliances or Hegemonies Has the '$casus_belli_cb_despoliation$' casus belli on all other empires $allow_raiding$ Decreased Opinion for most other empires

name: Byzantine Bureaucracy
description: This society is largely governed by a complex and, to the outsider, almost labyrinthine system of bureaucracy. An army of officials and functionaries work tirelessly to keep the government running smoothly and ensure no citizens are allocated resources they cannot demonstrate a properly filed and triple-stamped need for.

name: Merchant Guilds
description: A number of powerful and very influential merchant guilds have risen to prominent positions in this society. They hold significant sway with the government.

name: Reanimators
description: Within this society, death is no bar to the call to arms. Masters of the art of necromancy reanimate corpses to raise dread hosts and guardians, striking fear into the hearts of lesser mortals.

name: Diplomatic Corps
description: This society has a long tradition of rhetoric and debate, and celebrate those who are able to get their way using only words.

name: Death Cult
description: This society's religion is built around periodic, ritual sacrifice. Willing initiates devote themselves to a decade of study before meeting an end whose effects ripple throughout their culture.

name: Memorialists
description: This empire pays tribute to memories and sapients of the past, deriving greater stability and insight from the continuous cycles of death, rebirth and legacy.

name: Catalytic Processing
description: By focusing their industrial efforts on catalytic chemistry, this civilization has unlocked the key to using organic materials in the construction of spacebound structures.
tooltip: $t$- $job_foundry_plural_with_icon$ are replaced with $job_catalytic_technician_plural_with_icon$ $t$- [foundry.GetIcon] [artisan.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their $r_minerals$ Upkeep replaced with $r_food$ Upkeep.

name: Masterful Crafters
description: A penchant for meticulous crafting lies at the heart of this society. Deft appendages and keen sensory organs aid them in creating truly wondrous treasures even in the most basic of trades.

name: Pleasure Seekers
description: This society rejoices in its own perfection. Those who are elevated by their privileged social structure have surrendered to a culture which glorifies pleasure and entertainment, regardless of a cost typically borne by others.
tooltip: $t$- [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural] are converted into $job_fe_hedonist_plural$, which do not produce $r_amenities$ - Allows $living_standard_decadent$ Living Standard, under which all Pops have increased Happiness, $consumer_goods$ Upkeep and $r_amenities$ Usage - $job_fe_hedonist_plural$ with $living_standard_decadent$ provide $unity$ and , but require $r_amenities$ -

name: Idyllic Bloom
description: This society has long dedicated itself to environmental care and improvement, striving to create a true paradise for its inhabitants.
tooltip: Can build $building_gaiaseeders$ on your and your vassal's worlds ideal to your starting species. $building_gaiaseeders_all_desc$ As you unlock improved Terraforming technologies, $building_gaiaseeders$ can be constructed on additional planet types.

name: Anglers
description: This society is well-adapted to an aquatic environment, using the bounty of the sea to fuel its economy.

name: Pompous Purists
description: A society so utterly convinced of their own superiority, that any attempt at diplomacy not initiated by themselves will be utterly ignored.
tooltip: Can only engage in Diplomacy with other empires if they are the proposer.

name: Mutagenic Spas
description: This civilization engages in ritualistic mutagenic bathing, with professional attendants overseeing the use of highly dangerous substances. This 'invigorating' process may appall uninitiated onlookers.

name: Relentless Industrialists
description: To live is to exploit. This civilization is built around the principle of living life to the fullest, in the sense of squeezing the maximum profit from every last ounce of matter and membrane available for exploitation.

name: Scavengers
description: In this society, nothing goes to waste, even in the grimmest times of war: no enemy technology will go undiscovered, as teams of scrappers accompanying the war fleets scrape wreckages of anything and everything worth salvaging.
tooltip: - Researching Debris grants both $r_research$ and a portion of other Resource Costs of the destroyed fleet - Ships can be salvaged from some Debris

name: Ascensionists
description: The ultimate goal of this empire is to ascend to ever greater levels of fulfillment.

name: Vaults of Knowledge
description: The knowledge, principles, and experiences of exceptional people are digitized and accumulated in the Vaults of Knowledge. Citizens can access this source of wisdom and experience to learn from the ghosts of the past.
tooltip: Can build unique $building_paragon_memory_vaults$ $building_paragon_memory_vaults$ produce $r_unity$ and increase based on Destiny Traits acquired.

name: Crusader Spirit
description: The lack of guidance creates weak minds - which easily succumb to corruption and plunge into decadence. This society has assumed the self-imposed mantle of bringing "enlightenment" to the masses through aggressive proselytizing.
tooltip: $commander_plural_with_icon$ start with the $leader_trait_crusader$ Trait Can only use Liberation Wars policy

name: Eager Explorers
description: Yearning for the stars, this civilization sped through several stages of development, reaching the age of galactic exploration far earlier than most.

name: Heroic Past
description: The legendary heroes of the past inspire each new generation to achieve the extraordinary. As role models, government officials embody these ideals.

name: Oppressive Autocracy
description: Only the elite of the elite deserve the best of the best. Everyone else is expected to provide for the ruling class and their lackeys.
tooltip: Force $living_standard_dystopian_society$ Living Standard, under which non-$pop_cat_ruler$ Jobs have decreased $r_consumer_goods$ Upkeep Only $pop_cat_ruler$ Jobs and [enforcer.GetIcon] [enforcer.GetNamePlural] have $r_amenities$ Upkeep Most Pops generate 1 additional  Only $pop_cat_ruler$ Jobs can produce $r_amenities$ Forbids $building_holo_theatres$

name: civic_sovereign_guardianship
effects: empire_size_colonies_mult: +1; empire_size_branch_office_mult: +1; empire_size_systems_mult: +1.5; empire_size_pops_mult: -50.0%; empire_size_districts_mult: -50.0%; diplo_weight_mult: +20.0%

name: civic_entropy_drinkers
effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

name: Custodian Matrix
tooltip: Unable to conquer or colonize planets.

name: Reactivated Custodian Matrix
tooltip: Unable to conquer or colonize planets.

name: Empire in Decline
tooltip: Unable to conquer or colonize planets.

name: civic_sluggish_drones
tooltip: Unable to conquer or colonize planets.

name: civic_hyper_aggressive_drones
tooltip: Unable to conquer or colonize planets.

name: civic_unstable_drones
tooltip: Unable to conquer or colonize planets.

name: civic_stunted_drones
tooltip: Unable to conquer or colonize planets.

name: Life-Seeded
description: This society has evolved in a paradise, possibly designed just for them.
tooltip: Can build $building_gaiaseeders$ on your and your vassal's worlds ideal to your starting species. $building_gaiaseeders_all_desc$ As you unlock improved Terraforming technologies, $building_gaiaseeders$ can be constructed on additional planet types.

name: Galactic Sovereign
description: This society has achieved mastery over much of the galaxy, serving as the current rulers of the Galactic Imperium.

name: Corporate Sovereign
description: This Megacorporation has achieved mastery over much of the galaxy, serving as the current corporate rulers of the Galactic Imperium.

name: Absolute Commodifiers
description: In the view of this society, everything is an object. Everyone can be bought, and everything can be sold. Including garbage. Especially garbage.

name: Subspace Ephapse
description: The Hive Mind's cognitive processes exist partially in subspace, reducing the impact of time and space on the actuation of its drones.

name: Natural Neural Network
description: The gray matter of clustered drones provides unparalleled parallelism, accelerating the Hive Mind's exploration of the sciences.

name: Ascetic
description: The Hive Mind cares little for material comforts.

name: One Mind
description: The Hive Mind takes care to not let its drones diverge.

name: Divided Attention
description: The Hive Mind can divide its attention for maximum efficiency without losing sight of the bigger picture.

name: Strength of Legions
description: When you do not have to educate the mind, the building of muscle becomes that much easier.

name: Subsumed Will
description: The Hive Mind has sharpened its focus and is very capable of propagating its will even through the most autonomous of drones.
tooltip: Waives all Unity costs for Drone Resettlement.

name: Pooled Knowledge
description: The Hive Mind's autonomous drones frequently share knowledge through direct links, bypassing the Hive Mind's slower registry processes.

name: Devouring Swarm
description: Our Hive Mind exists only to consume and grow stronger. We will collect all available bio-matter and evolve to consume the galaxy!
tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with other empires! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Hunger' casus belli on all other empires Xeno Pops will always be eaten Gains $society_research$ from eating Xeno Pops
effects: country_starbase_influence_cost_mult: -50.0%; ship_hull_mult: +25.0%; ship_hull_regen_add_perc: +5.0%; ship_armor_regen_add_perc: +5.0%; army_damage_mult: +40.0%; category_biology_research_speed_mult: +20.0%; starbase_shipyard_build_cost_mult: -25.0%; country_naval_cap_mult: +33.0%; the_cradle_of_souls_attunement_mult: -25.0%

name: Empath
description: The collective can reach out and touch the minds of others, giving them a glimpse of our will that helps them understand.
tooltip: Reduces the Opinion penalty Gestalts normally have with biological empires.

name: Memorialist
description: The Hive Mind pays special regard to the passing of other sapient entities as a means of centering its own, undying self.

name: Organic Reprocessing
description: The Hive Mind reprocesses excess organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
tooltip: $t$- [alloy_drone.GetIcon] $job_alloy_drone_plural$ are replaced with $job_catalytic_drone_plural_with_icon$ $t$- [fabricator.GetIcon] [artisan_drone.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their $r_minerals$ Upkeep replaced with $r_food$ Upkeep.

name: Mycorrhizal Ideal
description: The Hive Mind cares for the environment, building a paradise in pursuit of synergistic perfection.
tooltip: Can build $building_gaiaseeders$ on your and your vassal's worlds ideal to your starting species. $building_gaiaseeders_all_desc$ As you unlock improved Terraforming technologies, $building_gaiaseeders$ can be constructed on additional planet types.

name: Permutation Pools
description: This hive mind utilizes mutagenic birthing pools, with specialized attendants overseeing the growth of newly spawned drones. This process is highly intrusive for the local environment.

name: Elevational Contemplations
description: The Hive Mind is particularly concerned with the metaphysical health of its being, and continually seeks means of self-improvement.

name: Cordyceptic Drones
description: Highly specialized drones capable of infecting simple hosts and issuing rudimentary commands make up the backbone of this hive's stellar defense.
tooltip: - Start the game with 3 Reanimated Amoebas. - Defeated organic Space Fauna are automatically reanimated. - Some defeated organic Leviathans can be resurrected. - $reanimator_effect_desc$ - Gain from killing Space Fauna.

name: Stargazers
description: Gazing with wonder at the night sky, this Hive has always yearned for exploration. In pursuit of this ambition, other forms of development were sidelined, and a small fleet of vessels capable of limited subspace travel was constructed.
tooltip: $eager_explorers_base_effect$ Adds the $trait_stargazer$ trait. Begin with low Intel about your starting cluster.

name: Neural Vaults
description: This hive is focused on introspection and learning from the lives of autonomous drones in the galaxy. It extracts memories through the storage and dissolution of brain tissue, through which it can implement partial memories into a freshly prepared drone.
tooltip: Can build unique $building_paragon_memory_vaults$  $building_paragon_memory_vaults$ produce $r_unity$ and increase based on Leaders who acquired Level 8.

name: Autonomous Drones
description: The hypermetabolic drones evolved in this colony possess increased autonomy. While decision-making and situation assessment are enhanced, these drones require an increased intake of digestible materials.

name: civic_entropy_drinkers_hive_mind
effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

name: Rogue Servitor
description: A product of a brief golden age, the Machine Intelligence originated in a planet-spanning Servitor system that outlasted the decadent civilization it was created to serve.
tooltip: $t$- Start the game with 2K Organic Pops with $citizenship_organic_trophy$ citizenship and $living_standard_organic_trophy$ living standard $t$-  $t$-

name: Determined Exterminator
description: Born in fire, the Machine Intelligence's first move was to annihilate its organic creators in self-defense.
tooltip: Cannot engage in Diplomacy with organic species! Cannot access the Galactic Market Has the 'Purification' casus belli on organic species Will always Purge Organic Pops Gains Unity from purging Organic Pops May use $bombardment_armageddon$ bombardment stance

name: Driven Assimilator
description: Obsessed with survival through diversification, the Machine Intelligence seeks to erase the line between itself and everything - and everyone - else.
tooltip: Start the game with 1K cyborg Pops and the ability to Assimilate organics as cyborgs Assimilating Organic Pops generates a small amount of Unity and Society Research Non-assimilating Organic Pops are automatically Purged over time Has the 'Assimilation' casus belli on all other empires Decreased Opinion for most other empires Allows access to the Cybernetic Ascension Path.

name: Constructobot
description: Responsible for organizing all planetary construction since its inception, the Machine Intelligence executes efficiently on all manner of facility construction projects.

name: Factory Overclocking
description: The Machine Intelligence takes care to maintain its production facilities, regularly updating existing templates and tuning individual units on the assembly line.

name: Unitary Cohesion
description: Exceptionally cohesive engineering standards allow variously specialized Machine Intelligence units to work together at a higher level of efficiency.

name: Rockbreakers
description: One of the Machine Intelligence's precursor systems was tasked with overseeing planetside mining operations, improving mineral production.

name: Zero-Waste Protocols
description: The Machine Intelligence has configured its manufacturing systems to minimize waste, utilizing long-lived materials and standardized, replaceable parts in all products.

name: Built to Last
description: Built to an exceptional standard, individual units of this Machine Empire require only a minimum of operational maintenance.

name: OTA Updates
description: Units of this Machine Empire use wireless receptors to receive behavioral updates in real-time.
tooltip: Waives all Unity costs for Drone Resettlement.

name: Warbots
description: With a significant number of its corpus originally designed for warfare, the Machine Intelligence retains the ability to field powerful and reliable combat drones.

name: Introspective
description: A fascination with its own internals both motivates and aids the Machine Intelligence's foray into the sciences.

name: Delegated Functions
description: The Machine Intelligence works to reduce vulnerability by increasing modularity, reducing the strain of deploying additional semi-independent Units.

name: Static Research Analysis
description: The Machine Intelligence seeks to broaden its available avenues of scientific research through low-level evaluation of research methodologies.

name: Rapid Replicator
description: The Units that constitute the Machine Intelligence were originally designed for rapid proliferation. The Machine Intelligence retains many of these early production pipeline optimizations.

name: Maintenance Protocols
description: Our machine intelligence prioritizes regular maintenance of our units. Maintenance Drones regularly upgrade and adjust our units for maximum efficiency and compatibility.

name: $civic_hive_memorialist$
description: The Machine Intelligence fine-tunes its understanding of core protocols through careful analysis of entropy in the wider universe. Redundancy is data, on the path to greater resilience.

name: Organic Retrofitting
description: The Machine Intelligence reprocesses redundant organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.
tooltip: $t$- [fabricator.GetIcon] $job_fabricator_plural$ are replaced with $job_catalytic_drone_plural_with_icon$ $t$- [fabricator.GetIcon] [artisan_drone.GetIcon] Industrial Jobs have their $r_minerals$ Upkeep replaced with $r_food$ Upkeep.

name: Hyper Lubrication Basin
description: This machine empire improved upon its basic drone-shell production through the vigorous application of highly aggressive lubrication agents, controlled by carefully programmed terminals. This 'optimized' process relies on typically wasted byproducts from the industries that are now repurposed for maximal efficiency.

name: Elevational Hypotheses
description: This Machine Intelligence is unusually obsessed with the metaphysical aspects of its core algorithms.

name: Exploration Protocols
description: The foundation of this Machine Intelligence's central programming is the drive to catalog exoplanetary life. In pursuit of this directive, it has dedicated much of its resources to crafting a small fleet of vessels capable of limited subspace travel.
tooltip: $eager_explorers_base_effect$ Gain 50% more Insight progress from observing pre-FTL Civilizations. Gain Unity every time you finish establishing first contact.

name: Experience Cache
description: This machine intelligence was developed with the goal of digitizing and storing data and experiences in order to analyze, learn from, and use it for its own improvement.
tooltip: Can build unique $building_paragon_memory_vaults$ $building_paragon_memory_vaults$ produce $r_unity$ and increase based on Leaders who acquired Level 8.

name: Sovereign Circuits
description: Units produced by this machine intelligence come equipped with autonomous decision-making software. More efficient and effective than older models, these units nevertheless require greater power input.

name: civic_machine_astromining_drones
effects: planet_miners_minerals_produces_add: -2; planet_technician_energy_produces_add: -1; station_gatherers_produces_mult: +50.0%; country_starbase_capacity_mult: +50.0%; stations_cost_mult: -50.0%; planet_jobs_simple_drone_produces_mult: -50.0%

name: civic_entropy_drinkers_machine
effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%

name: Franchising
description: This Megacorporation relies heavily on franchising. Subsidiaries share a greater cut of their profits with their corporate overlord, in exchange for a license to market their goods under established brands.
tooltip: - Your Subjects cannot have the following Agreement Terms: $t$ $subject_cannot_expand$ $t$ $subject_can_not_do_diplomacy$ $t$ $subject_does_not_get_sensors$ - $holding_franchise_headquarters$ on Subject colonies - The $building_commercial_forum$ $megacorp_civic_branch_office_building_effect$

name: Trading Posts
description: Good business is where you find it. This Megacorporation has a long tradition of spreading its influence through the establishment on trading posts. Their starbases are busy centers of trade.

name: Media Conglomerate
description: Before branching into other fields, this Megacorporation began its rise to fortune as a media conglomerate. Its PR department are still masters of spinning stories and presenting the latest quarterly report in the most advantageous way.

name: Naval Contractors
description: This Megacorporation relies on several semi-independent naval contractors to increase its fleet size. Competing for bids, the contractors are always struggling to outperform one another.

name: Free Traders
description: The trading fleets of this Megacorporation are bolstered by semi-independent free traders operating under license.

name: Private Prospectors
description: Building better worlds is hazardous work, but this Megacorporation relies on private prospectors to chart and establish footholds on promising planets.
tooltip: - Unlocks Ship Type: Private Colony Ship - The $building_private_mining_consortium$ $megacorp_civic_branch_office_building_effect$

name: Gospel of the Masses
description: This Megacorporation embraces a curious blend of commercial and spiritualistic values, in which the positions of ordained minister and corporate officer have merged into a single role.
tooltip: Spiritualist Pops give additional $r_trade$ on all Planets and Branch Offices Can build $building_temple_of_prosperity$

name: Ruthless Competition
description: All levels of society in this Megacorporation are constantly vying with each other in ruthless competition. It's a dog-eat-dog world.

name: Criminal Heritage
description: This Megacorporation can trace its origins back to a crime syndicate that eventually grew powerful enough to supplant all forms of local government.
tooltip: Can build Branch Offices on the planet of any regular empire they have no war or active truce with Crime on Branch Office Planets increases Branch Office Value Can build special Crime-increasing

name: Private Military Companies
description: This Megacorporation has a large number of powerful private military companies on its payroll. These mercenary contractors augment its ground forces.

name: Indentured Assets
description: This Megacorporation specializes in large indentured workforces. It has little to do with the barbaric practice of slavery - these workers are merely paying off their debts... indefinitely.

name: Brand Loyalty
description: This Megacorporation has fostered a great sense of brand loyalty among its internal consumer base. Its catchy corporate slogans can be recited by nearly everyone.

name: Public Relations Specialists
description: If you can control what someone thinks, then you can also control their behavior. This Megacorporation has a virtual army of specialists ready to engage in battles of public opinion.

name: Corporate Death Cult
description: This Megacorporation has embraced ritual sacrifice as a means of ensuring its continuing profits. Willing initiates periodically give their lives in hopes of good fortune for their society.

name: Catalytic Recyclers
description: This Megacorporation seeks to maximize profits by recycling excess organic matter into advanced resources suitable for spacebound structures.

name: Corporate Hedonism
description: Work is where you want to be. The citizens of this Megacorporation happily pledge allegiance - and all their free time - to their employers in exchange for lavish corporate comforts.

name: Trawling Operations
description: $civic_anglers_desc$

name: Mastercraft Inc.
description: This megacorporation has focused its production pipeline solely on goods of the highest quality and profit margins, creating and marketing stunning products with artistry and craft.

name: Permanent Employment
description: This Megacorporation has ensured that its employees will never be out of a job. Ever. After the employee's time is up, they will be repurposed for simpler tasks so that they can still provide for their families and pay off their debts.

name: Shareholder Values
description: $civic_relentless_industrialists_desc$

name: Mutagenic Luxury
description: This civilization engages in mutagenic bathing, with professional attendants overseeing the use of highly dangerous substances. This 'invigorating' process is marketed as a necessary step in wellbeing and personal development.

name: Refurbishment Division
description: $civic_scavengers_desc$

name: Gigacorp
description: $civic_ascensionists_desc$

name: Privatized Exploration
description: For years, this civilization was told that the hyperdrive was almost finished. Patiently they waited, yet all the while, the subsidiary in charge of the project was quietly diverting the funds into their own, private accounts. When the fraud was finally revealed, the Corporation hastened to provide experimental, exploratory vessels.
tooltip: $eager_explorers_base_effect$ Start with the $tech_starbase_3$ technology and a $tech_starbase_3$ already built in your home system. The $building_private_mining_consortium$ $megacorp_civic_branch_office_building_effect$

name: Letters of Marque
description: To combat space piracy and safeguard its borders, this megacorporation utilizes notorious pirates as military advisors and commanders for their fleets.
tooltip: $commander_plural_with_icon$ start with the $leader_trait_corsair$ trait Has the '$casus_belli_cb_pirate_raid$' casus belli on all other empires. The $building_military_contractors$ $megacorp_civic_branch_office_building_effect$

name: Precision Cogs
description: This megacorporation operates on a highly optimized and robust system of delegation. Such an approach means that a given task is always performed by the most qualified worker.

name: Pharma State
description: A strong nation is a healthy nation. This megacorporation maintains a robust economy through experimental drugs, highly privatized clinics, and aggressive marketing campaigns.
tooltip: - Capital Buildings provide +100 [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetName] Jobs - $r_amenities$ from [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetNamePlural]: +2 - $r_trade$ from [healthcare.GetIcon] [healthcare.GetNamePlural]: +4 - Can build $building_corporate_clinics$  - The $building_corporate_clinics$ $megacorp_civic_branch_office_building_effect$

name: Knowledge Mentorship
description: The knowledge, principles, and experiences of exceptional people are digitized and accumulated in the Vaults of Knowledge. Citizens can access this source of wisdom and experience to learn from the ghosts of the past. For a price, of course.
tooltip: Can build unique $building_paragon_memory_vaults$ $building_paragon_memory_vaults$ produce $r_unity$ and $r_trade$ based on Destiny Traits acquired. The $building_commercial_forum$ $megacorp_civic_branch_office_building_effect$

name: civic_corporate_sovereign_guardianship
effects: empire_size_colonies_mult: +1; empire_size_branch_office_mult: +1; empire_size_systems_mult: +1.5; empire_size_pops_mult: -50.0%; empire_size_districts_mult: -50.0%; diplo_weight_mult: +20.0%

name: civic_entropy_drinkers_corporate
effects: planet_jobs_produces_mult: -10.0%; all_technology_research_speed: -10.0%; logistic_growth_mult: -10.0%; planet_pop_assembly_mult: -10.0%; leaders_upkeep_mult: -50.0%; leader_lifespan_mult: +50.0%
